---
$schema: "../../../schemas/context-map.schema.json"
version: "2.0"

# Context map generated by Velocity /init
# Edit this file to add or update bounded contexts.
#
# For workspace-connected repositories, this file is also updated by /sync
# when the workspace adds new bounded contexts relevant to this repository.

primary_context: "{{PRIMARY_CONTEXT_ID}}"

# workspace: (set by /sync when workspace intelligence is pulled)
#   name: "{{WORKSPACE_NAME}}"
#   architecture_style: "{{ARCHITECTURE_STYLE}}"
#   shared_patterns: []

contexts:
  - id: "{{PRIMARY_CONTEXT_ID}}"
    name: "{{PRIMARY_CONTEXT_NAME}}"
    path: CONTEXT.md
    description: "{{PRIMARY_CONTEXT_DESCRIPTION}}"
    # owner_team: ""
    # dependencies: []
    # repository: ""  # set when this context is shared from workspace

# Add additional bounded contexts below as your system grows:
# - id: payments
#   name: Payments
#   path: services/payments/CONTEXT.md
#   description: Payment processing and settlement
#   owner_team: payments-team

# Workspace-shared contexts (populated by /sync from workspace intelligence):
# These are bounded contexts from OTHER repositories that this repository integrates with.
# Agents read these for cross-repo domain language awareness.
# - id: customer
#   name: Customer
#   repository: customer-service    # owning repository
#   path: .velocity/contexts/customer/CONTEXT.md  # workspace snapshot
#   description: Customer profiles and account management
#   workspace_managed: true          # do not edit directly — updated by /sync
---
